ClientContractId.description: The unique ID of the sale of the contract.

SuspensionType.description: ex. Illness, Injury, Vacation. (Note this can be customized by each studio). If provided, then Duration, DurationUnit, and SuspensionFee (if applicable) are automatically applied. Restrict Days are not supported.

SuspensionStart.description: The contract suspension start date. Default: *today’s date*

Duration.description: The number of (DurationUnit) the suspension lasts.

OpenEnded.description: When `true`, indicates that suspension is open ended. Also, when `true`, then Duration and DurationUnit are ignored. Default: *false*

SuspensionNotes.description: The comments for suspending a contract.
SuspensionNotes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

SuspensionFee.description: An optional charge that clients who wish to pause a contract for a set period of time can be charged.
